title: Mostop RC Crawler 1/18 Scale 4WD Off Road RC Truck Rock Climbing Vehicle with Light,Waterproof Remote Control Truck with 2 Batteries,Throttle & Speed Control Jeep RC Truck 4x4 All Terrain Rock Crawler
features: [Proportional Steering Control RC Truck]This RC Truck 4x4 RC Jeep Off Road features a simulated structure with realistic car handling, to achieve high speeds, rapid acceleration or deceleration, rapid braking, reversing, left and right turns of the full-size transmission. The rc truck is designed with LED headlights, LED turn signals and LED taillights, all with three modes, constant, slow flash and fast flash

[All Terrain RC Jeep Truck]This hobby RC truck for adults is a 4WD rock crawler rc truck that can conquer any terrain. It is capable of running at speeds up to 12km/h and adapts to a wide range of terrain, with metal shock absorbers and suspension that can easily handle rugged terrain such as beaches, snow, grass, mountains, rocks and more

[Strong Chassis Construction] Professional metal chassis and upgraded steering system are designed to achieve 45 degrees of large torsion angle steering, strong torque and flexible performance. The suspension system of this rc jeep truck crawler is equipped with four suspension springs, which can protect the RC car from the vibration caused by the rough road, thus making the ride stea

[2.4Ghz Remote Control Truck] 2.4Ghz high frequency design makes it fast response and long control distance. Proportional steering and speed control design allows you to fine-tune the speed and direction of forward/backward/left/right turns. You can play the 4WD rc truck climbing vehicles with your friends at the same time without any interference. This is a great RC off-road truck for indoors and outdoors.

[Great Hobby RC Truck Toy Gift] This RC truck 4x4 off road RC monster truck is equipped with 2 pack 7.4V 600mah rechargeable batteries, 2 hour charging can support about 30 minute playing, 2 batteries can support longer playing time and double fun. This RC truck is designed with a realistic truck function and it is a great gift for Christmas, Thanksgiving, and birthday for adults boys age 8+
